strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across software, hardware, and infrastructure — exceeding the minimum requirement with deep full-stack fluency in cloud-native and AI-adjacent systems.
Proven AI-agent infrastructure contributions at re:cinq and open-source AI-adjacent tooling (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating builder fluency in AI-powered product development.
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective for 8+ years, plus consistent internal innovation through workshops, open-source libraries, and cross-functional leadership.
concerns: No explicit Master’s or PhD in AI-related field — though practical AI experience compensates for this absence.
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting direct customer engagement in Germany-based roles.
Resume uses inconsistent name (Aisha Okonkwo vs. szabobogdan.com/github links) — raises minor administrative flag, though not indicative of performance.
response.justification: Aisha brings more than 15 years of deep, hands-on engineering experience across cloud, AI-agent systems, and infrastructure — directly matching the role’s core mandate — while also demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative through an 8-year open-source AI-adjacent platform and consistent leadership in technical education and tooling, making them a compelling fit for a director-level IC role focused on strategic AI innovation.
